subcodes.first_line: Praise and gratitude be unto God! The Sun of love hath risen and shineth forth from the horizon of Alexandria, and the pearls of sincerity and humility are manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد و المنه آفتاب محبت از افق اسکندریه مشرق و لائح و لئالی خلوص و خضوع
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer
